description: §6.13.4 E-DEBOUNCED-WITH-DERIVED — `debounced=`/`throttled=` on a `const`-derived cell is forbidden: derived cells are read-only and debounce/throttle is a write-side wrapper. `const <doubled debounced=300ms> = @count * 2` fires E-DEBOUNCED-WITH-DERIVED. Asserted AS an error. Incidental E-DG-002 / W-PROGRAM-001 ignored by superset matching.
rationale: §6.13.4 / §6.13.6: `debounced=`/`throttled=` on a const-derived state-decl SHALL fire E-DEBOUNCED-WITH-DERIVED — the write-side timing wrapper is meaningless on a read-only derived cell.
